mapper.select: SELECT A.MSG_SEQ , A.MSG_TYPE , A.BNKING_ID , NVL(TO_CHAR(A.VECTOR_ID), '') AS VECTOR_ID , TO_CHAR(A.SEND_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS SEND_DATE , A.CAMP_SEQ , B.TITLE , B.CNTS , B.CONTENTS_MSG , B.WEB_URL , B.IMG_URL FROM TMB_PUSHMSG_CAMP A , TMB_CAMP_CONTENTS B WHERE A.CAMP_SEQ = B.CAMP_SEQ AND A.APP_NO = '3' AND A.BNKING_ID = #{bnkingId} AND ( SEND_DT >= TO_DATE(#{inqStrDate}, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND SEND_DT < TO_DATE(#{inqEndDate} , 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ) AND A.STS_CD = '000' AND A.MSG_TYPE IN ('87', '88', '89') ORDER BY A.SEND_DT DESC
SELECT A.MSG_SEQ, B.WEB_URL, B.IMG_URL FROM TMB_PUSHMSG_CAMP A , TMB_CAMP_CONTENTS B WHERE A.CAMP_SEQ = B.CAMP_SEQ AND A.APP_NO = '3' AND A.MSG_SEQ = #{msgSeq}

SELECT A.MSG_SEQ , A.MSG_TYPE , A.BNKING_ID , NVL(TO_CHAR(A.VECTOR_ID), '') AS VECTOR_ID , TO_CHAR(A.SEND_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS SEND_DATE , A.CAMP_SEQ , B.TITLE , B.CNTS , B.CONTENTS_MSG , B.WEB_URL , B.IMG_URL FROM TMB_PUSHMSG_CAMP A , TMB_CAMP_CONTENTS B WHERE A.CAMP_SEQ = B.CAMP_SEQ AND A.APP_NO = '3' AND A.BNKING_ID = #{bnkingId} AND ( SEND_DT >= TO_DATE(#{inqStrDate}, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND SEND_DT < TO_DATE(#{inqEndDate} , 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ) AND A.STS_CD = '000'
AND A.MSG_TYPE IN ('11', '12')
AND A.MSG_TYPE IN ('03', '04', '05', '13')
AND A.MSG_TYPE IN ('02', '14', '77')
AND A.MSG_TYPE IN ('02', '04', '03', '05','11', '12', '13', '14', '77')
ORDER BY A.SEND_DT DESC
